title: Announcement on the Postponement of Exams on January 19, 2026
content:
Announcement on the Postponement of Exams on January 19, 2026

Due to adverse weather conditions, the exams scheduled for today (19.01.2026)

in our faculties

other than the School of Preparatory Education, as well as within

the Vocational School of Health Services,

have been postponed.

The new dates for the postponed exams will be announced on the official websites of the relevant faculties.

Kindly submitted.

Üsküdar University Rectorate
